Q06.title: 幾何圖形的辨識
Q06.questionText: 請問在右圖的雪人中沒有用到哪一種形狀？
Q06.questionSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' class='w-full h-auto max-h-[280px]'><rect x='75' y='15' width='50' height='30' fill='#1e293b' /><rect x='60' y='45' width='80' height='10' fill='#1e293b' /><circle cx='100' cy='80' r='25' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='4' /><circle cx='100' cy='145' r='40' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='4' /><circle cx='92' cy='72' r='3' fill='#1e293b' /><circle cx='108' cy='72' r='3' fill='#1e293b' /><polygon points='100,75 125,82 100,85' fill='#f97316' /><circle cx='100' cy='120' r='4' fill='#1e293b' /><circle cx='100' cy='140' r='4' fill='#1e293b' /><circle cx='100' cy='160' r='4' fill='#1e293b' /><ellipse cx='45' cy='115' rx='25' ry='8' fill='none' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='4' transform='rotate(30 45 115)' /><ellipse cx='155' cy='115' rx='25' ry='8' fill='none' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='4' transform='rotate(-30 155 115)' /><ellipse cx='80' cy='185' rx='15' ry='8' fill='#1e293b' /><ellipse cx='120' cy='185' rx='15' ry='8' fill='#1e293b' /></svg>

steps.title: 步驟一：逐一比對特徵
steps.content: 雪人頭身是完美的圓形，鼻子是尖尖的三角形，帽子是長寬不一的矩形，手腳是扁平的橢圓形。

steps.title: 步驟二：找出缺失形狀
steps.content: 經比對，圖中沒有發現四個直角且四邊等長的正方形。

Q07.title: 數列規律與間隔
Q07.questionText: 小益從 20 開始每兩兩一數。請問她第十個數到的數是什麼？
Q07.questionSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 500 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' class='w-full h-auto max-h-[280px]'><g transform='translate(10, 50)' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='20' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'><text x='30' y='0' text-anchor='middle'>第1個</text><text x='430' y='0' text-anchor='middle' fill='#ef4444'>第10個</text><rect x='0' y='20' width='60' height='40' rx='8' fill='#f1f5f9' stroke='#94a3b8' stroke-width='2'/><text x='30' y='47' text-anchor='middle'>20</text><text x='330' y='47' text-anchor='middle' fill='#94a3b8'>...</text><rect x='400' y='20' width='60' height='40' rx='8' fill='#fef2f2' stroke='#ef4444' stroke-width='3'/><text x='430' y='47' text-anchor='middle' fill='#ef4444'>?</text></g><path d='M 40 125 Q 240 210 440 125' fill='none' stroke='#0ea5e9' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='8,4'/><text x='240' y='195' text-anchor='middle' font-size='20' font-weight='bold' fill='#0ea5e9'>跨越了 9 個間隔 (+2)</text></svg>

steps.title: 步驟一：理解間隔數量
steps.content: 第1個數字是 20，每次「加 2」。要數到第 10 個，代表需要從起點往前跳 9 個間隔 (10 - 1 = 9)。

steps.title: 步驟二：執行計算
steps.content:
每個間隔增加 2，總增加量：9 × 2 = 18。
將起始值加上增加量：20 + 18 = 38。

Q08.title: 長條圖的資料讀取
Q08.questionText: 圖是由3年級班製作的。請問總共多少位學生挑選星期六或星期日為最喜歡的日子？
Q08.questionSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' class='w-full h-auto max-h-[280px]'><path d='M40 30 h240 M40 60 h240 M40 90 h240 M40 120 h240 M40 150 h240' stroke='#cbd5e1' stroke-width='1' fill='none'/><path d='M40 150 h240 M40 20 v130' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><rect x='200' y='0' width='20' height='150' fill='#0ea5e9' /><text x='210' y='-5' text-anchor='middle' fill='#ef4444' font-weight='bold'>5</text><rect x='230' y='60' width='20' height='90' fill='#0ea5e9' /><text x='240' y='55' text-anchor='middle' fill='#ef4444' font-weight='bold'>3</text><g font-size='12' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b' text-anchor='end'><text x='35' y='34'>4</text><text x='35' y='64'>3</text><text x='35' y='94'>2</text><text x='35' y='124'>1</text><text x='35' y='154'>0</text><text x='35' y='4'>5</text></g><g fill='#94a3b8'><rect x='50' y='120' width='20' height='30' /><rect x='80' y='90' width='20' height='60' /><rect x='110' y='120' width='20' height='30' /><rect x='140' y='120' width='20' height='30' /><rect x='170' y='60' width='20' height='90' /></g><g font-size='10' font-weight='bold' text-anchor='middle'><text x='60' y='165'>一</text><text x='90' y='165'>二</text><text x='120' y='165'>三</text><text x='150' y='165'>四</text><text x='180' y='165'>五</text><text x='210' y='165' fill='#0ea5e9'>六</text><text x='240' y='165' fill='#0ea5e9'>日</text></g></svg>

steps.title: 步驟一：讀取資訊
steps.content: 觀察長條圖中橫軸的「星期六」與「星期日」，對照垂直軸的人數：星期六有 5 位，星期日有 3 位。

steps.title: 步驟二：計算總和
steps.content: 題目要求這兩天的總和，所以將兩者相加即可：5 + 3 = 8。

Q09.title: 指針時鐘的時間差
Q09.questionText: 請問從出發到結束共經過了多少分鐘？
Q09.questionSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 350 180' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' class='w-full h-auto max-h-[280px]'><g transform='translate(80, 80)'><circle cx='0' cy='0' r='60' fill='#fff' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='4' /><path d='M0 -50 v-10 M50 0 h10 M0 50 v10 M-50 0 h-10' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='3'/><text x='0' y='-35' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-weight='bold'>12</text><text x='35' y='5' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-weight='bold'>3</text><line x1='0' y1='0' x2='-25' y2='-17' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='5' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='0' y1='0' x2='39' y2='-23' stroke='#0ea5e9' stroke-width='3' stroke-linecap='round'/><text x='0' y='85' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>出發: 10:10</text></g><path d='M 160 80 L 180 80' stroke='#94a3b8' stroke-width='4' /><polygon points='190,80 175,72 175,88' fill='#94a3b8' /><g transform='translate(270, 80)'><circle cx='0' cy='0' r='60' fill='#fff' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='4' /><path d='M0 -50 v-10 M50 0 h10 M0 50 v10 M-50 0 h-10' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='3'/><text x='0' y='-35' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-weight='bold'>12</text><text x='-35' y='5' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-weight='bold'>9</text><line x1='0' y1='0' x2='-16' y2='-26' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='5' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='0' y1='0' x2='-14' y2='-43' stroke='#0ea5e9' stroke-width='3' stroke-linecap='round'/><text x='0' y='85' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>結束: 10:57</text></g></svg>

steps.title: 步驟一：判讀時間
steps.content: 左邊時鐘為出發時間 10:10，右邊時鐘為結束時間 10:57。

steps.title: 步驟二：計算差值
steps.content: 在同一個小時內，直接將分鐘相減：57 - 10 = 47 分鐘。

Q10.title: 序列排隊與相對位置
Q10.questionText: 全排共有15人，艾蒂排前第4，路易排後第4，兩人之間有幾人？
Q10.questionSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 500 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' class='w-full h-auto max-h-[280px]'><circle cx='30' cy='100' r='10' fill='#cbd5e1' /><circle cx='60' cy='100' r='10' fill='#cbd5e1' /><circle cx='90' cy='100' r='10' fill='#cbd5e1' /><circle cx='120' cy='100' r='12' fill='#ef4444' stroke='#7f1d1d' stroke-width='2'/><text x='120' y='130' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-weight='bold' fill='#ef4444'>艾蒂(4)</text><circle cx='150' cy='100' r='10' fill='#0ea5e9' /><circle cx='180' cy='100' r='10' fill='#0ea5e9' /><circle cx='210' cy='100' r='10' fill='#0ea5e9' /><circle cx='240' cy='100' r='10' fill='#0ea5e9' /><circle cx='270' cy='100' r='10' fill='#0ea5e9' /><circle cx='300' cy='100' r='10' fill='#0ea5e9' /><circle cx='330' cy='100' r='10' fill='#0ea5e9' /><circle cx='360' cy='100' r='12' fill='#ef4444' stroke='#7f1d1d' stroke-width='2'/><text x='360' y='130' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-weight='bold' fill='#ef4444'>路易(後4)</text><circle cx='390' cy='100' r='10' fill='#cbd5e1' /><circle cx='420' cy='100' r='10' fill='#cbd5e1' /><circle cx='450' cy='100' r='10' fill='#cbd5e1' /><path d='M 30 70 L 30 60 L 120 60 L 120 70' fill='none' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2' /><text x='75' y='50' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>前段4人</text><path d='M 360 70 L 360 60 L 450 60 L 450 70' fill='none' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2' /><text x='405' y='50' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>後段4人</text><path d='M 150 145 L 150 155 L 330 155 L 330 145' fill='none' stroke='#0ea5e9' stroke-width='3' /><text x='240' y='175' text-anchor='middle' font-size='16' font-weight='bold' fill='#0ea5e9'>15 - 4 - 4 = ?</text></svg>

steps.title: 步驟一：扣除首尾區塊
steps.content: 艾蒂排第 4，代表前段共 4 人。路易排倒數第 4，代表後段共 4 人。

steps.title: 步驟二：計算中間人數
steps.content: 總數 15 人，扣掉前段 4 人與後段 4 人，剩下就是中間的人數：15 - 4 - 4 = 7 人。
